title: MNT Staking - Open App
meta_description: mnt staking starts at Mantle Rewards Station: lock MNT, allocate Mantle Power, and check available rewards in the official app.
hero_h2: Lock MNT and allocate Mantle Power
hero_lead: mnt staking routes holders to Mantle Rewards Station, where they can lock MNT, choose a lock period, allocate Mantle Power, and claim available rewards from the official app.
what_is: Mantle Rewards Station is Mantle's official rewards app for locking MNT, allocating Mantle Power to pools, and claiming available rewards. Mantle's tokenomics docs describe MNT as both a governance token and a utility token used for gas fees on Mantle Network and as a principal asset within Rewards Station.

how.d: Go to the official Mantle Rewards Station domain and connect the wallet that holds MNT.
Enter the amount, review the lock terms, and confirm the transaction in your wallet.
Select the lock-in period shown by the app; longer periods may affect Mantle Power.
Allocate Mantle Power to available reward pools, then return to the dashboard to view and claim rewards when available.

points.p: The primary action should send users to Mantle Rewards Station, not to a clone, exchange, or unaffiliated staking page.
The app describes participation as locking MNT, building Mantle Power, allocating to reward pools, and claiming available rewards; no fixed APY should be assumed.
MNT is used across Mantle for governance and network utility, with token details published in Mantle's official docs.

faq.a: It commonly refers to using Mantle Rewards Station to lock MNT, receive Mantle Power, allocate to reward pools, and claim available rewards through the official app.

faq.q: Where should I do mnt staking safely?
faq.a: Use the official app at rewards.mantle.xyz and verify the domain before connecting a wallet or signing any transaction.

faq.q: Does mnt staking have a fixed APY?
faq.a: Do not assume a fixed APY unless it is displayed by the official app for a specific pool or campaign; reward terms can vary by event and allocation.

faq.q: Is mnt staking the same as network validator staking?
faq.a: No. Mantle Rewards Station frames the flow as locking MNT and allocating Mantle Power to reward opportunities, not running or delegating to validators.

faq.q: Which network do I need for mnt staking?
faq.a: Use the network and wallet prompts shown inside the official Mantle Rewards Station app, and keep enough gas available for required transactions.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify the rewards.mantle.xyz domain before connecting. Educational only, not financial advice.
